activityWelcome: Welcome to colabora! This is your Activity Feed where you'll see all document activity. Start by creating your first document to begin collaborating.
diffColorLegend: Color guide: Yellow/amber = first suggestion's changes, Blue = second suggestion's changes, Strikethrough = deleted text.
diffToggleVisible: Use this button to see how suggestions differ from the original text. The diff view highlights changes with colors.
diffViewEnabled: Diff view shows changes: yellow highlights new text, strikethrough shows deleted text. You can select up to 2 suggestions to compare them side-by-side.
documentEmptyState: Start by adding your first heading or paragraph. You can edit it later and collaborators can suggest improvements.
enhancedDiffViewOpened: This enhanced view shows the suggestion in context with surrounding paragraphs. Use the toggle to switch between focused and full document context.
firstParagraphAdded: Great! Now you can edit this paragraph or make suggestions. Double-click any paragraph to edit, or click 'Suggest' to propose changes that others can vote on.
firstSuggestionShown: Great! You've made a suggestion. Now collaborators can vote on it. Suggestions need enough PRO votes to be automatically accepted.
suggestionCheckboxExplanation: Check this box to compare this suggestion with others. You can select up to 2 suggestions at once.
suggestionSelectedForComparison: You've selected a suggestion for comparison. Select another to compare them side-by-side, or use the diff toggle to see changes against the original.
twoSuggestionsCompared: Comparing two suggestions! Yellow highlights show changes from the first suggestion, blue shows changes from the second. Use this to decide which version to vote for.

welcome.createDocumentDescription: Start with a blank page or use a template
welcome.democraticVotingDescription: Every change requires 75% approval from all collaborators, ensuring consensus-driven decisions.
welcome.description: Create and collaborate on documents with your team using our unique voting system.
welcome.featuresDescription: Discover what makes collaborative drafting powerful.
welcome.finalAgreementsDescription: View the finalized, agreed-upon version of your document with all approved changes.
welcome.howItWorksDescription: Our collaborative drafting process is simple and effective.
welcome.inviteCollaboratorsDescription: Add team members to work together
welcome.realtimeCollaborationDescription: Multiple team members can propose, discuss, and vote on changes simultaneously.
welcome.title: Welcome to Collaborative Drafting!
welcome.versionHistoryDescription: Track all changes and maintain a complete history of your document's evolution.
welcome.voteAndApproveDescription: Changes need 75% approval to be accepted
welcome.voteOnChangesDescription: Team members vote on suggestions democratically
